title: nepeta nepetella
intro: Nepeta nepetella, also known as Catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues. Nepeta nepetella can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and calmness.
